minecraft:emitter_initialization.creation_expression: v.wlarwhb = 3; v.hahlhow=0; v.pegfumj=0; v.rgztdom=0; v.ucbteoy=0; v.chcvwqs=0; v.pkzkfjf=0; v.svtfpiu = 0; v.efccfwg = 5/20; v.cxpqszt = 0.9; v.lfdgqpy=0; v.oogsmay=0; v.gygngpk=16; v.tcuermi=16; v.yntnwgf=1; v.brtepfb=0.5; v.mjxejye=0.5;
minecraft:emitter_initialization.per_update_expression: v.wlarwhb ? {v.wlarwhb = v.wlarwhb-1; !v.wlarwhb ? { v.smymsra = v.emitter_age; v.ltrmqax = v.svtfpiu+v.efccfwg*2; }; };

color: v.wlarwhb ? {return 0;}; t.ptfylby = v.cxpqszt*math.hermite_blend(1-math.clamp((v.particle_age-v.smymsra)/v.efccfwg, 0, 1)); t.ptfylby=(t.ptfylby-v.cxpqszt)/(t.ptfylby-1); t.lonhuhh = v.smymsra + v.efccfwg + v.svtfpiu; return v.particle_age>t.lonhuhh?math.min(1, v.cxpqszt*math.hermite_blend(1 - math.clamp((v.particle_age-t.lonhuhh)/v.efccfwg, 0, 1))/1):t.ptfylby;
